page_content:
SOCY849 Research Seminar in Demography (1 Credit) An advanced research seminar for students preparing to do research or take comprehensive examinations in demography. Restriction: Permission of instructor. Repeatable to: 6 credits.

SOCY858 Research Seminar in Gender, Work and Family (1 Credit) An advanced research seminar for students preparing to do research or take the specialty examination in Gender, Work and Family. Restriction: Permission of instructor. Repeatable to: 6 credits.
